UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a registered user account on the RP Coach-Up platform, serving as a base for both students and teachers. This entity stores common user information and links to specific roles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The unique email address of the user, used for login and communication.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

userType.description: The role of the user on the platform (Student or Teacher).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Holds specific profile details for a student user, extending the base UserProfile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the associated UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 Student)

gradeLevel.description: The current academic grade or level of the student.

Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Holds specific profile details for a teacher user, extending the base UserProfile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the associated UserProfile. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 Teacher)

experienceYears.description: Number of years of teaching experience.

StudentInterest.title: StudentInterest
StudentInterest.description: Stores the specific subject and topic interests submitted by a student for tuition classes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentInterest entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the student account who submitted these interests.

studentName.description: The name of the student needing tuition.

school.description: The school the student currently attends.

gradeOrClass.description: The current class or grade level of the student.

affordableRange.description: The range of tuition fees affordable for the student.

intendedStartDate.description: The date when the student intends to start classes.

submissionDate.description: Timestamp when the interest form was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the interest submission.

TeacherInterest.title: TeacherInterest
TeacherInterest.description: Stores the teaching interests and availability submitted by a teacher for tuition classes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TeacherInterest entity.

teacherId.description: Reference to the teacher who submitted these interests.

resumeName.description: Name of the uploaded resume file.

submissionDate.description: Timestamp when the interest form was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the interest submission.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a system notification record for the administrator dashboard.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Stores simulated email content for students and teachers to read in their dashboard.

MatchProposal.title: MatchProposal
MatchProposal.description: Represents a proposed match between a student and a teacher created by an administrator.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

params.name: studentInterestId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific student interest submission.

definition.description: Stores individual teacher interest and availability submissions.

params.name: teacherInterestId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific teacher interest submission.

definition.description: Stores system notifications intended for administrators.
Stores simulated email content readable by users and admins.
A sentinel collection used for Database Access Control (DBAC) to designate administrators.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of an administrator.

definition.description: Stores administrator-created matches between students and teachers.

params.name: matchProposalId
params.description: Unique identifier for a match proposal.
